description: Maps workflow roles to preferred models and harnesses. Override with HARNESS=... or by choosing a different terminal.

macro-reviewer.notes: Big picture: design quality for docs, spec fidelity for code. MULTI-MODEL reviews go through the claude-hub review engine (python3 -m claude_hub.review_cli); its config/review_models.yaml is the authoritative reviewer roster — do not duplicate rosters here. The gemini tool_by_artifact entries are STALE: the standalone gemini CLI is retired (Antigravity/agy is not integrated with workflow-role); until that is resolved, run doc macro-reviews through the engine or override HARNESS explicitly.

micro-reviewer.notes: Line-level code quality. Historical: open models (glm-5, minimax, kimi-k2.5, grok, mimo) dropped 2026-03-31 — review grades showed 0-67% pass rates with false negatives and HARMFUL grades. Reviewer rosters now live in claude-hub config/review_models.yaml (authoritative); this file only picks the harness for single-model interactive role sessions.

guidance.description: Per-model guidance files that supplement role instructions. Injected when a model is used for a role where we've observed specific failure modes. Not rubrics — context about what matters and why.
